title: Funniest moments in Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Funniest moments in Evangelion             Quote Post by Nephilim » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:31 am Wich moments in Evangelion gave you a lot of laughs? In my opinion, Episode 9 is the funniest, "Both of You Dance Like You Want to Win". There are so many funny faces and moments in that episode. Post any specific moment that you think is the best !

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:40 am must agree...the syncronization exercises where hilarious...

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:41 am "...is she still so wild in bed?" *everyone falls down, including me*

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Mon Jul 12, 2004 1:03 am Here you have a little collage of the funniest faces and expressions in evangelion: [url]http://www.med.ufro.cl/tecmed/cachureos/claudio/funnyfaces.jpg[/url] You can use either of them as an avatar if you like :P

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 12, 2004 1:07 am It is so hard to pick , but I am going to have to say "...is she still so wild in bed?" If I remember this was directed to Shinji ,

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Mon Jul 12, 2004 1:44 am it's hot ..yes thermal expansion toothpicks

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:05 am coff wrote: it's hot ..yes thermal expansion toothpicks

[]: heh             Quote Post by the-artist-known-as-chris » Mon Jul 12, 2004 10:02 am Even though id rather be between Misato's breats, this is would be a good place for me to die.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jul 12, 2004 10:20 am The opening to Asuka Strikes! Where Asuka clobbers everybody because her dress got caught in the wind, and Touji's "change" for her viewing fee. Best scene in the series right there.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Mon Jul 12, 2004 10:31 am The las time i saw all the series and the movie, i was so used to the serious aspects of the series, that i laugh so hard for the ridicolous of this scene:

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jul 12, 2004 10:33 am Asuka: Look at you! Your like a drowned rat!

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:15 pm I thought it was funny when Shinji had to wear Asuka's plugsuit.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:29 pm the end of episode 10, with Sandolphon

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:04 pm "Misato he hit me in my most sensitive spot""ooohhlet me seee....Asuka i didnt know your skin was so smooth" [enter pen pen] "thermal expansion...how embarassing..."

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jul 12, 2004 5:32 pm And the lemon writers had a field day....

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 12, 2004 5:41 pm "Misato he hit me in my most sensitive spot""ooohhlet me seee....Asuka i didnt know your skin was so smooth" [enter pen pen] "thermal expansion...how embarassing..."

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Jul 12, 2004 5:56 pm Episode 9 by a long shot, I laughed hard throughout this one, and it brought back those stupid memories of having to dance in gym class, which made it funnier

[]:             Quote Post by quatre1453 » Tue Jul 13, 2004 1:12 am what are you riding his bolonie ponie OMG i thought i craped my pants

[]:             Quote Post by Somnius Kenate » Tue Jul 13, 2004 1:50 am "Overpriced! Here is your change!"

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Tue Jul 13, 2004 1:51 am When the pilots were crawling in the air vent and Asuka kicked Shinji in the face three times. That made me laugh more than anything else in the series.
summary:
[]: Funniest moments in Evangelion             Quote Post by Nephilim » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:31 am Wich moments in Evangelion gave you a lot of laughs? In my opinion, Episode 9 is the funniest, "Both of You Dance Like You Want to Win". There are so many funny faces and moments in that episode. Post any specific moment that you think is the best !

[]:             Quote Post by sadsa
